---
title: "CommandsSubmission"
description: "This class can be used to build a valid submission. It provides create(String, String, Optional, List) for initial creation and methods to set optional parameters e.g withActAs(List), withWorkflowId(String) etc. Usage: var submission = CommandsSubmission.create(userId, commandId, Optional.of(synchronizerId), commands) .withAccessToken(token) .withWorkflowId(workflowId) .with..."
---
